overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking along a wooden pedestrian promenade beneath a futuristic transit overpass. The scene features dense greenery, large digital billboards advertising 'CIRKUS' and 'JUDY', and scattered pedestrians in a sunlit urban environment transitioning to shaded covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian promenade with tree planters approaching overpass

agents.ego_description: player character walking steadily along the sunlit wooden promenade toward the distant overpass and billboards

entered.detail: wide wooden plank pedestrian pathway extending forward
raised planters with dense trees and shrubs lining the left side
large dark transit structure spanning across the path ahead
large red digital billboard with white text and star logo
large purple digital billboard featuring a woman's face with neon text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit wooden pedestrian walkway lined with lush green planters on the left. The camera follows the player character walking toward a massive overpass structure ahead, with two large digital billboards visible in the distance. The space is open to the sky with scattered pedestrians walking in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit overpass with digital advertising displays

events.description: entering the shadow of the overpass, lighting shifts from bright direct sunlight to dappled shade
transitioning from open promenade into the covered walkway beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, passing pedestrians walking in opposite directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the right side of the path
pedestrian in teal top walking past the camera on the left

entered.detail: series of illuminated digital advertisement panels mounted on the right wall
bright yellow modern benches lined along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves from bright sunlight into the shadow of the overpass, transitioning to a covered walkway. Digital advertising screens line the right wall above yellow benches where people sit. The large billboards ahead become more prominent as the camera approaches, and pedestrian traffic increases with people walking in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with seating areas and large neon billboards

events.description: player character approaches and passes by the yellow bench seating area with occupied seats

agents.ego_description: walking deeper under the overpass, passing by NPCs seated on yellow benches and continuing toward the billboards

notable_agents.action: person sitting on yellow bench against the right wall

entered.detail: thick dense bushes and plants in the planters approaching the foreground

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the overpass canopy, the player passes the yellow bench area where NPCs are seated. The vegetation on the left becomes denser and closer to the path. The large digital billboards for 'CIRKUS' and 'JUDY' dominate the view ahead, glowing brightly in the shaded environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed walkway end approaching billboard wall with dense vegetation

events.description: dense shrubbery on left temporarily obscures view as camera passes very close to the vegetation
slowing as approaching the end of the walkway near the billboard wall

agents.ego_description: player character walking close to the dense vegetation on the left, approaching the billboard wall at the end of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking very close to the dense shrubbery on the left, with the large billboards now directly ahead. The yellow benches and right wall displays have passed out of view. The walkway narrows as it approaches the billboard wall at the end of the covered promenade, with the vegetation nearly encroaching on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wooden pedestrian promenade that transitions from a bright, open-air walkway into a shaded urban canopy. It begins in brilliant sunlight beside lush green planters, following the player character toward a massive overpass structure and distant digital billboards. As the player moves beneath the overpass, the lighting shifts into deep shadow and the scene expands to include yellow benches and advertising screens lining the right wall. The camera then pushes deeper into the covered area, where the vegetation on the left becomes denser and the glowing billboards for CIRKUS and JUDY grow to dominate the field of view. Finally, the walkway narrows as the player passes the seating area and moves close to the encroaching shrubbery, heading directly toward the towering billboard wall at the end of the promenade.
